---
pagetitle: "Day 2 Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Day 2 Student Presenters
Tuesday, 26 May 2026 | 13:00 - 16:45 WIB  
@Ruang Kuliah IV, Faculty of Biology, UGM  
@Auditorium, Faculty of Biology, UGM
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}
<div id="schedule-table"></div>

<script>
const SCHEDULE = {
  startHour: 13,
  startMinute: 0,
  slotMinutes: 15,
  files: ["../assets/reguler-selasa.json"]
};

function renderSchedule(containerId, config) {
  const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
  let t = config.startHour * 60 + config.startMinute;

  function fmtTime(minutes) {
    const h = String(Math.floor(minutes / 60)).padStart(2, "0");
    const m = String(minutes % 60).padStart(2, "0");
    return `${h}:${m}`;
  }

  function render(data) {
    let html = `<table class="table table-striped table-hover schedule-table">`;
    html += `<thead><tr><th>Time</th><th>Group</th><th>Theme</th><th>Title</th><th>Members</th><th>GitHub</th></tr></thead>`;
    html += `<tbody>`;
    data.forEach(g => {
      const start = fmtTime(t);
      t += config.slotMinutes;
      const end = fmtTime(t);
      const title = g.title?.trim() || "(No title)";
      const theme = g.theme?.trim() || "";
      const members = g.members?.map(m => m.name).join(", ") || "";
      const github = g.github?.trim();
      html += `<tr>
        <td>${start} - ${end}</td>
        <td>${g.group}</td>
        <td><em>${theme}</em></td>
        <td>${title}</td>
        <td>${members}</td>
        <td>${github ? '<a href="' + github + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Link</a>' : ""}</td>
      </tr>`;
    });
    html += `</tbody></table>`;
    container.innerHTML = html;
  }

  Promise.all(config.files.map(url => fetch(url).then(r => r.json()))).then(files => {
    const allGroups = files.flat();
    render(allGroups);
  });
}

renderSchedule("schedule-table", SCHEDULE);
</script>

<style>
.schedule-table th {
  background: #2c3e50;
  color: white;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.schedule-table td {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.schedule-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f8f9fa;
}
.schedule-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #e9ecef;
}
.schedule-table td:first-child {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #2c3e50;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(2) {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #34495e;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(3) {
  color: #7f8c8d;
  font-style: italic;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(4) {
  max-width: 400px;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(5) {
  max-width: 300px;
  color: #555;
}
</style>

:::
:::
